description: Demonstrate using AI to generate Python utility to extract "Constants of Dispersion Formula" from optical product datasheets using PDF parsing.
High-accuracy PDF content extraction skill for Claude Code — formulas, images, tables, scanned docs. Powered by MinerU.
Two-stage Docling + VLM pipeline: PDF/DOCX → Markdown, with formula/image/table extraction (cropped screenshots) and LLM-generated descriptions inserted back for RAG-ready docs.

A test suite designed to rigorously evaluate and compare the performance of leading PDF parsers, including LlamaParse, ContextForce, and Jina.ai. This comprehensive suite benchmarks each parser's capabilities across key areas: basic text extraction, OCR extraction, table extraction, and formula detection.

Comprehensive PDF parser focused on metadata-rich, layout-aware extraction. Combines PyMuPDF/pdfplumber text analysis, Camelot/Tabula tables, image and formula capture, plus    column detection to preserve reading order. Ships with TOON export + token comparisons, CLI examples, and utilities for visual debug + dataset generation.
